title: OACP Escalation Request Payload (v1)
description: Payload schema for messages with payloadType = 'escalation-request-v1' (carried in ESCALATION_REQUESTED messages). Per spec §3a.13, escalation requests expanded authority to perform an action (distinct from review, which seeks decision-support input). Escalations have TTL discipline; missing TTL triggers ESCALATION_TTL_REQUIRED.

escalationType.description: Reserved escalation types plus namespace-prefixed custom types.

rationale.description: Required free-text rationale. SHOULD be concise (under 1000 characters).

requestedScope.description: Optional. The expanded scope being requested (e.g., additional readable_patterns for SCOPE_EXPANSION). Shape is escalationType-specific.

evidenceRefs.description: Optional supporting evidence for the escalation.

currentDecisionRef.description: Optional. The current authorization decision being escalated past (e.g., a DENY that the requester wants reconsidered).

expectedReviewerType.description: Optional hint about who should handle this escalation. Authoritative routing is policy-driven.

businessDeadline.description: Informational deadline. NOT protocol TTL — use envelope ttl.expiresAt.
